short: Moonshot AI's assistant and model family, known for long-context handling.
definition: Kimi is the assistant and model family from the Chinese company Moonshot AI, known for handling very long inputs well and, in later open-weight releases (with the model's internal settings shared for anyone to download and run), strong coding and agentic performance — that is, carrying out multi-step tasks on its own. It is available as a chatbot and through model releases that developers can build on. Specific capabilities and versions change over time.
